node.name: cmd_vel_mux
node.rosparam: topics: - name: navigation topic: cmd_vel_mux/input/navi timeout: 1.0 priority: 0 - name: safety topic: cmd_vel_mux/input/safety_controller timeout: 1.0 priority: 10 - name: teleop topic: cmd_vel_mux/input/teleop timeout: 1.0 priority: 2 - name: switch topic: cmd_vel_mux/input/switch timeout: 1.0 priority: 5
